Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT DOMINIC TSE'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIF JUDY TAM is off calendar, discovery motion. Counsel to call and calendar in proper department. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintif Judy Tam; Order For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT DOMINIC TSE's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff Judy Tam is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for her deposition on a date to be agreed upon by counsel, to be completed no later than August 3, 2010. The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to agree to a date for Plaintiff's deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $660, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Order For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT DOMINIC TSE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted. Plaintiff's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiff's reservation of a right to amend her answers is ordered stricken. The code of civil procedure establishes procedures to be followed if amendments are necessary. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. The court finds that the responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,320, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JUDY TAM Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. The claim for medical malpractice is time-barred. CCP section 340.5. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Katy Anne Bersamin, CSR # 11722
